reasons: VIX regime stable — good for weekly holds
Macro data inline with expectations — less directional clarity

entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (2.80) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires 2.7% move to $127.80 (weekly expected move: 7.3%).

thesis: ** Momentum (95) and trend persistence (85) are the dominant signals, indicating FTNT is in a strong, sustained uptrend entering this week. IV mispricing at 78 suggests we're buying relatively cheap premium for the realized move potential. **Kill condition:** A break below the 20-day SMA or a VIX spike above 25 that would deweight momentum by 30% (high-regime multiplier 0.7x), undermining the core signal driving this pick.

entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (2.92) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires 1.1% move to $119.08 (weekly expected move: 6.7%).

thesis: ** Momentum (87) and trend persistence (85) are driving downside conviction, and this is the sole candidate where the bearish market narrative aligns with the scored direction — every other pick conflicts. Earnings this week actually amplifies the put thesis: if results disappoint, IV crush works in our favor as the stock gaps down through the strike. **Kill condition:** A blowout earnings beat with guidance raise that gaps LULU >5% higher, destroying the put's delta immediately; also invalidated if pre-earnings IV inflation pushes the premium above 1.3x IV/RV ratio, making the entry too expensive relative to realized vol.

entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (5.28) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires 0.7% move to $300.28 (weekly expected move: 4.4%).

thesis: ** Trend persistence (85) and momentum (82) are well-supported by unusual options flow and fresh analyst upgrades, suggesting institutional conviction behind the move. The liquidity score (76) means tight bid-ask spreads and clean execution — critical when macro edge is only 0.55x and we need every basis point. **Kill condition:** Monday's high-impact event creating a broad risk-off gap >2% in SPY, which would invalidate the call thesis on a high-beta-to-market name; also exit if delta drifts below 0.20 by Wednesday given charm decay on a weekly hold.
